commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7c0ed398efc91a41fd819c568cfb59a32abd603e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Discord message search accept `query`/`content` and infer a missing `guildId` from channel info, with focused runtime tests and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +45, Docs +1. Total +81 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and `v2026.5.28` still require `guildId` for Discord message search, and the linked issue includes live guild-channel logs where the model omitted it; I did not run a live Discord repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because contributor-supplied real behavior proof is missing, while the code cleanup itself is small.

target.title: fix(discord): resolve guildId from session channel for search actions
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
